title: TOTP (Time-Based One-Time Password) Setup and Troubleshooting
text:
Q: How do I set up and troubleshoot TOTP for my account?
A: To set up TOTP for your account, first, ensure you have a TOTP authenticator app installed, such as Google Authenticator or Authy. Windows: Open your authenticator app and select 'Add Account' or the '+' icon. macOS: Open your authenticator app and click on 'Add Account' or the '+' icon. Next, log in to your company account and navigate to the security settings. Windows: Look for 'Two-Factor Authentication' or 'TOTP Setup' and click 'Enable'. macOS: Find 'Two-Factor Authentication' or 'TOTP Setup' and select 'Enable'. You will see a QR code or a secret key. Windows: Scan the QR code with your app or enter the secret key manually. macOS: Similarly, scan the QR code or input the secret key. After adding the account, your app will generate a TOTP code. Enter this code back into your company account to verify the setup. If you encounter issues, ensure your device's time is synchronized correctly; Windows: Check 'Date & Time Settings' and enable 'Set time automatically'. macOS: Go to 'System Preferences' > 'Date & Time' and check 'Set date and time automatically'. If problems persist, try re-adding the account in your authenticator app or contact IT support for further assistance.
